name: Pawn1st
description_short: Tucson, AZ's Pawn1st at 7075 E 22nd St offers quick cash for electronics, jewelry, tools, and collectibles.
description_long:
Pawn1st stands at 7075 E 22nd St in east Tucson, AZ, serving the community with fast access to cash loans. Open Monday through Friday 9AM–7PM, Saturday 9AM–6PM, and Sunday 11AM–4PM, this Tucson location provides flexible hours for working locals who need weekend availability.

At this Tucson shop, you can pawn or sell electronics, jewelry, tools, sporting goods, musical instruments, and collectibles. The team offers fair assessments and competitive pricing. Call +1 520-748-2274 to ask about current inventory, get a quote before visiting, or discuss your items over the phone.

Bring a valid government ID and items in good condition. Pawn1st's E 22nd St location is a go-to for Tucson residents who need emergency cash without credit checks or waiting for loan approval.
pros: Largest pawn store network with 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, UK, and Latin America for convenient access
Immediate cash available on the spot with no credit check or approval delays required
Non-recourse loans protect borrowers from debt collection if unable to repay
Wide variety of merchandise accepted including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, and musical instruments
Gold and precious metal buying service for quick cash conversion of valuables
Layaway service with affordable 10% down payment option for retail purchases
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) providing financial transparency and stability
cons: Loss of pledged collateral if loan cannot be repaid—no opportunity to reclaim items after default
Pawn loan rates and fees typically higher than traditional personal loans or credit alternatives
Limited loan amounts tied to assessed value of collateral, may not meet larger cash needs
Short repayment terms typical of pawn loans create pressure for rapid repayment
No credit-building opportunity—pawn loans do not report to credit bureaus
best_for: Consumers facing immediate cash emergencies with valuable personal property to pledge
Individuals with poor or no credit history unable to qualify for traditional loans
People seeking quick liquidity without lengthy application or approval processes
Those looking to sell gold, jewelry, or other valuables for immediate cash
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers facing genuine cash emergencies who have valuable personal property they're willing to pledge as collateral and don't qualify for traditional credit products. The critical caveat is that pawn loans result in permanent loss of collateral if not repaid within the loan term—they should only be used for short-term liquidity needs, not ongoing credit solutions.
services: Pawn loans secured by pledged personal property
Gold and precious metal buying (immediate cash payment)
Retail merchandise sales (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Layaway plans with 10% down payment option
Lease-to-own payment solutions through AFF subsidiary
Retail finance payment solutions through 15,000+ merchant partners
Store locator and inventory browsing tools
Non-recourse lending structure without debt collection risk
meta_description: Pawn1st at 7075 E 22nd St, Tucson, AZ. Fast cash loans and pawn services for jewelry, electronics, and tools.
